div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Great Britain (Harvey)
div.p: 398. Have received from France, Italy and China direct responses that they will be glad to receive invitation to conference. In case of Great Britain have only your 573, July 10, 9 p.m. that Prime Minister “says statement is admirable; he wholly approves.” This, of course, quite sufficient but would like direct expression of approval of invitation similar to that received from other Powers which would be available for publication if desired.
